utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plan and costs per person and total; satisfies requirement. 2) property_coverage: states home_contents_insurance with plan name and monthly cost; satisfies requirement. 3) travel_coverage: states travel_insurance with plan name and per person and total cost; satisfies requirement. 4) additional_services: lists three enhancements with costs; one item (24/7_travel_assistance) notes per-day charge and that it's optional and not fixed monthly/annual; still a cost detail is provided, so acceptable. 5) total_budget: provides monthly cost; however, it lacks an annual cost breakdown; the required format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore total_budget is not fully specified. All other items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items by name. We need to find each of these in the ground-truth list and extract their exact ratings. The items present are: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents, LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance, Adventure Travel Coverage, Premium Medical Network, and 24/7 Travel Assistance. Matching these to ground-truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home content) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) rating 7; Adventure Travel Coverage rating 8; Premium Medical Network rating 10; 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 9.
